case_title: J.M.T. MECHANICAL et al VS CAIFORNIA AUREL PARTNERS

docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CAIFORNIA AUREL PARTNERS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT CAIFORNIA AUREL PARTNERS AT PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST. DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO TRANSFER IS MOOT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

MOTION TO TRANSFER AND DECLARATION FILED. $1.00 TRANSFER FEE PAID.
